Container.Name: vpn-port-manager
Container.Overview: Manages VPN port forwardings (Azire VPN) and creates DNAT and firewall rules on a UniFi Dream Machine Pro. Provider and router settings are configured inside the web UI on first boot (no env vars for credentials).
Container.Description: VPN Port Manager - manages port forwardings from VPN providers and creates corresponding UniFi network rules with post-step hooks (Plex, webhooks, commands). On first boot, open the Web UI and complete the setup wizard to configure the VPN provider and router.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the web management interface

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent storage for SQLite database (encrypted settings + port mappings)

Config.Name: App Secret Key
Config.Description: Encryption key for stored VPN + router secrets (16+ chars, generate with: openssl rand -hex 32). Do NOT change this after the first boot.
